product.name: TERLEENART Bamboo Pendant Light,Set of 2 Boho Round Basket Chandelier Handmade Woven Pendant Light, Natural Bamboo Rattan Hanging Chandelier for Kitchen Island Dining Room Living Room Porch
features: One set with 2 pcs.Dimension: Adjustable wire length 55" h. Back Plate: 4.72" dia,0.98" h. Shade: 11.41" dia,6.89" h.
BULB REQUIREMENT:E26 socket.Voltage: 110V/120V.Accommodates dimmable LED bulb, Edison bulb,or Incandescent, Halogen bulb (Max wattage: 60W). Note: bulbs are not included.

EXQUISITE DESIGN:This hand-woven bamboo pendant light artistic chandelier is hand-woven with high-quality bamboo, hollow double hemispherical lampshade with natural color. It creates an intricate pattern that allows soft, warm light to shine through, casting captivating shadows on the walls.

WIDELY APPLICATION:This lamp can be used alone or in combination of two or three lamps according to space conditions. It is suitable for living rooms, dining rooms, bedroom restaurants, cafes, bars and other places.

ADJUSTABLE CORD:These pendant lights with adjustable black brained wire (Max Length: 55") allow you to customize the hanging height for better lighting effect and desired look,it also flexibility hang at sloped ceiling.This boho lamp will emit beautiful amber light when lit, creating a comfortable and warm feeling.
